title: Landing page renders and CTA is visible
description: Verify the landing page loads and primary call-to-action is present.
steps: Verify Open Dashboard CTA is visible

title: Protected route redirects when unauthenticated
description: Verify dashboard route redirects to login when no auth session is set.
steps: Verify login form fields are visible

title: Fleet page shell loads
description: Verify fleet page layout shell renders for authenticated route handling.
steps: Verify page main content region is visible
Verify no fatal runtime error is shown
